$comment: trcc-display config. All values here can be changed and reloaded (POST /reload). See README.md for the full schema.

usb.$comment: 0x0416:0x8001 (Thermalright/Winbond HID). interface 0, OUT ep 0x02, IN ep 0x81.

profile.$comment: force = filename stem (e.g. "pa120") to skip handshake PM detection. Leave null to auto-select by the PM byte the device reports.

api.$comment: set false to run fully headless (no HTTP listener) — pair with source.kind=sensors for a self-contained local driver.

render.$comment2: when several tiles share one slot, how long each is shown
render.$comment3: frame cadence (rotation + REST overrides apply within one tick)
render.$comment4: color for always-on / unit / source-indicator LEDs

$tiles_note: LF8 profile (Phantom Spirit 120 Digital EVO) slots: temp/watt/mhz/use shown at once. Put a second tile on a slot (e.g. a cpu_temp with slot=temp) to rotate CPU/GPU like the stock firmware.
